wikitext:
{{Relic Infobox|Screaming Flagon|2}}
The {{R|Screaming Flagon||2}} is a {{QueryLink|Relics|rarity:RARITY|Shop|2}} {{2|Relics|Relic}} in Slay the Spire 2. It deals 20 damage to all enemies at the end of each of your turns, but only if you have no cards in hand.

== Notes ==

=== Sources ===

* The Screaming Flagon can only be purchased from a Shop.

=== Order ===

* The Screaming Flagon checks your hand before discarding your cards or exhausting Ethereal cards.

== Strategy ==

The Screaming Flagon deals an impressive amount of damage every turn, but only if you can consistently empty your hand. Cards which cost no {{Icon|CE|2}} are good, as they can reduce your handsize by 1 when played while leaving you with full {{Icon|CE|2}} to play other cards. Cards which can discard or exhaust other cards from your hand are also very helpful. Cards which draw more cards, while strong in general, make it harder to empty your hand and take advantage of the Screaming Flagon.

=== Synergies ===

* Any source of Exhaust is strong, with {{C|Fiend Fire||2}} and {{C|Eidolon||2}} being particularly useful due to exhausting ALL cards.
* Cards which discard other cards are helpful, with {{C|Survivor||2}} being available to Silent from the start of the game and giving -2 handsize when played. Cards which discard your entire hand are particularly strong, especially {{C|Storm of Steel||2}} and {{C|Shadow Step||2}}.

=== Anti-Synergies ===

* Cards like {{C|Acrobatics||2}} or {{C|Skim||2}} which draw extra cards can make it harder to empty your hand.
* Curses like {{C|Ascender's Bane||2}} can make it impossible to activate Screaming Flagon when you draw them, unless you can remove them from your hand by discarding or exhausting them with another card.
* Extra draw from relics like {{R|Ring of the Snake||2}} or {{R|Pael's Blood||2}} means that you will need to be able to play more cards.
* {{R|Unceasing Top||2}} makes it impossible to empty your hand unless your entire deck is in the exhaust pile, making Screaming Flagon essentially useless.
